meta.description: Metadata about this file, such as its name and repository source.

entries.description: Top-level entries of the universe tree. Usually contains a single $root node.

$id.description: Stable identifier used for referencing this entry across the dataset.

kind.description: Type of media this entry represents. '$root' is a virtual node used to group all entries belonging to the same universe.

chronology.description: Optional information describing the chronological order of this entry within its universe.

status.description: Tracking information such as watch progress, reading progress, and personal notes.

childs.description: Direct child entries of this node. Entries at the same depth level are interpreted as seasons of the same series. Nested children (children of children) represent spin-offs, side stories, or other extended universe content.

related.description: Related entries that share the same universe or are connected conceptually, but are not part of the direct hierarchy.

$reference.description: References to other entries by id. Use this field when only a link is needed instead of embedding the full object.

Entry.title: Entry
Entry.description: A node representing a media entry within the universe tree. It can be a root node, a series, a movie, or any related media.

EntryReference.description: Lightweight reference to another Anime entry.

github.description: URL or identifier of the GitHub repository where this data is maintained.

watched.description: Indicates whether this entry has been watched.

favorite.description: Marks this entry as a personal favorite.

chapter.description: Current chapter reached. Used for readable media such as manga, manhwa, or novels.

completed.description: Indicates whether this entry has been fully completed.

rating.description: Personal rating for the current entry.

EntryStatus.title: EntryStatus
EntryStatus.description: User-specific status and progress information for an entry.
